nodes.name: HTTP - SB PATCH session gmail thread
CODE - Expand CVs and duplicate flag1

parameters.jsCode:
const j = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { ...j, cv_plaintext: String(j.cv_text || '').replace(/\r/g, '').trim() } }];

parameters.subject: =Your application — next step: technical assessment (Phase {{ $json.session_phase }}/{{ $json.config.max_questions }})
parameters.message:
={{ (() => { const score = $json.score ?? 0; const maxQ = $json.config?.max_questions ?? 5; const org = $json.config?.organization_name || 'Talent Acquisition Team'; const role = $json.config?.requisition_title || 'Open role'; const email = String($json.candidate_email || '').trim().split('\n')[0].split(/\s+regards/i)[0].trim(); const session = $json.session_db_id || $json.id || ''; const link = 'https://talent-acquisition-six.vercel.app/?session=' + encodeURIComponent(session) + '&email=' + encodeURIComponent(email); return `

Talent Assessment

You are shortlisted

Hello,

Your CV has been successfully screened for ${role} with a score of ${score}/100.

To proceed, complete our interactive technical assessment. It has ${maxQ} timed phases. Each phase includes one question linked to your CV and the job description.

Start your assessment

If the button does not work, copy this link into your browser:

${link}

Regards,
${org}

Please use a desktop browser, allow fullscreen, and keep the assessment tab focused.

`; })() }}

nodes.name: CODE - SB URLs after outreach mail1

parameters.responseBody:
={{ {
  score: $("CODE - Pick Parse Result").first().json.score,
  feedback: $("CODE - Pick Parse Result").first().json.feedback,
  nextQuestion: $("CODE - Pick Parse Result").first().json.nextQuestion,
  time_limit_seconds: $("CODE - Pick Parse Result").first().json.time_limit_seconds,
  deadline_at: $("CODE - Pick Parse Result").first().json.deadline_at,
  complexity_tier: $("CODE - Pick Parse Result").first().json.complexity_tier,
  isFinal: $("CODE - Pick Parse Result").first().json.isFinal,
  result: $("CODE - Pick Parse Result").first().json.result || '',
  assessment_mode: $("CODE - Pick Parse Result").first().json.assessment_mode || 'text',
  startSpeech: $("CODE - Pick Parse Result").first().json.startSpeech || false,
  speech_phases: $("CODE - Pick Parse Result").first().json.speech_phases || 3,
  soft_skills: $("CODE - Pick Parse Result").first().json.soft_skills || null
} }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { scheduling_status: 'candidate_invited', scheduling_updated_at: new Date().toISOString(), updated_at: new Date().toISOString() } }}
={{ { scheduling_status: 'done', scheduling_updated_at: new Date().toISOString(), updated_at: new Date().toISOString() } }}

parameters.responseBody:
={{ {
  ok: true,
  session_id: $json.session_id,
  system_instruction: $json.system_instruction,
  gemini_live_model: $json.gemini_live_model,
  live_relay_url: $json.live_relay_url,
  live_complete_webhook: $json.live_complete_webhook,
  speech_phases: $json.speech_phases,
  current_phase: $json.current_phase,
  requisition_title: $json.requisition_title,
  assessment_mode: "live_speech"
} }}
